subcodes.title: Some Answered Questions #022 The Miracles of Christ
subcodes.first_line: The Manifestations of God are sources of miraculous deeds and marvellous signs.
subcodes.first_line_orig: مظاهر مقدسهء الهیه مصدر معجزاتند و مظهر آثار عجیبه هر امر مشکلی و غیر ممکنی
subcodes.subjects: @miracles and their interpretation, @two kinds of knowledge [ilm and irfan]; sight and insight, @life and death, @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @multiple meanings; interpretations in scripture, @spiritual transformation, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
